keyFeatures.en: Format, validate, and beautify JSON online
keyFeatures.zh: 在线格式化、验证和美化JSON

keyFeatures.en: Syntax highlighting, error detection, and tree view
keyFeatures.zh: 语法高亮、错误检测和树状视图

keyFeatures.en: No sign-up required, runs in your browser
keyFeatures.zh: 无需注册，直接在浏览器中运行

description.en: No sign-up required, syntax highlighting, error detection, tree view, and data stats
description.zh: 无需注册，提供语法高亮、错误检测、树状视图和数据统计

weaknesses.en: Limited to browser-based use, no offline capabilities
weaknesses.zh: 仅限于浏览器使用，没有离线功能

weaknesses.en: No detailed pricing information for premium features
weaknesses.zh: 未提供高级功能的详细定价信息

targetAudience.en: Developers and individuals who need to format, validate, and beautify JSON data
targetAudience.zh: 需要格式化、验证和美化JSON数据的开发人员和个体用户

positioning.en: A free online tool for JSON formatting, validation, and beautification
positioning.zh: 一个免费的在线工具，用于JSON格式化、验证和美化
